description: Captures browser console, network, and DOM on 127.0.0.1 and exposes them as MCP tools. Causally correlated, source-mapped, PII-redacted. Nothing leaves your laptop.

MERGEN_PORT.description: Loopback port the local HTTP ingestion server binds to (3000–3010 are auto-tried).

tools.name: get_status
tools.description: Health, buffer occupancy, and analyses-per-day counter.

tools.name: get_recent_logs
tools.description: Last N console events (level, message, source, ts).

tools.name: get_network_activity
tools.description: Last N fetch/XHR events with timing + status.

tools.name: get_dom_context
tools.description: Snapshot of the active tab's DOM + framework hints.

tools.name: analyze_runtime
tools.description: Causal Context Pack: ranked hypotheses + source-mapped evidence.

examples.title: Why did this page just throw?
examples.prompt: Use analyze_runtime to find the root cause of the most recent error on the active tab.

examples.title: Show me the slow request
examples.prompt: Call get_network_activity and rank by duration; identify retries or 5xx clusters.
